audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences in thread_group_impl.h are safe on reachable paths: thread_run guards init_func and dest_func before dereferencing; io_service is always the address of a member variable; stop() only accesses _threads when _is_running==true, which is set after _threads allocation. closure_run_helper and ext_closure_run_helper dereference handle without internal null checks, but all callers (simple_rpc_channel_impl.cc L179, dynamic_rpc_channel_impl.cc L190) consistently guard against NULL before calling post(), and the SCHECK abort enforces this invariant at runtime.
